findings.description: The source file contains 4 h2-level sections (overline+underline style with dashes), but the knowledge file covers only 3. The fourth section, anchored as `howto_window_scope`, begins at the very end of the provided source (overline visible: `--------------------------`) with no corresponding section (s4) in the knowledge file.
findings.source_evidence:
Source ends with:
```
.. _`howto_window_scope`:

--------------------------
```
Knowledge file index has only s1, s2, s3.

findings.description: `ValidationContext` is a PascalCase class name explicitly used in all Action class code examples in section s3 (e.g., `ValidationContext<W11AC03Form> formCtx = ...`) but is absent from s3's hints array.
findings.source_evidence:
Source s3 Action class examples:
```java
ValidationContext<W11AC03Form> formCtx =
    ValidationUtil.validateAndConvertRequest("W11AC03", W11AC03Form.class, req, "updateUser");
```
